description: Generated USPS Track & Confirm read-only WSDL-family MCP catalog manifest.

notes: Official USPS Web Tools APIs documentation: https://www.usps.com/business/web-tools-apis/documentation-updates.htm

USPS does not publish a first-party WSDL/SOAP document; its public Web Tools interface is an XML-over-HTTP GET API, catalogued here under the wsdl-2-mcp importer per this catalog's family assignment for legacy-style RPC operations, matching the precedent set by the Salesforce/Airtable OpenAPI manifests for providers without a first-party machine-readable spec.
Selected operation is USPS's officially documented read-only Track & Confirm (TrackV2) package tracking request.
USPS authenticates Web Tools requests via a registered USERID query parameter (Web Tools does not use a password); this manifest models it as an api-key env ref only, never a literal value.

process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
